text:
Once upon a time there was a wise old owl named Ollie. Every dawn Ollie would peer out from her nest in the dark tree, keenly listening to the symphony of morning life. She knew every songbird by name.

One day Ollie thought she heard a new one. It was so sweet and cheerful that it made her heart sing. She decided to investigate. After a cautious flight through the quiet forest, she found a little bird she had never seen before. Its feathers were like soft lavender and its eyes sparkled with mischief.

This cheerful bird was named Clover. She had decided to fly south every autumn to visit Ollie and sing her song. Ollie watched with a big grin.

Every day they would dance around, sharing stories from their travels. One time Clover had danced so hard she fell into some mud. "Oh no!" she had squeaked. But Ollie clucked soothingly.

Then Clover showed Ollie something amazing
